---
title: "About Me"
toc: false
---

## Hi, I'm Owen Heap

<!-- Add a photo: place a headshot at assets/img/headshot.jpg and uncomment below -->
<!-- ![Owen Heap](assets/img/headshot.jpg){width=200px style="border-radius:50%; float:right; margin-left:2rem;"} -->

I'm a data scientist with a focus on statistical modeling and data visualization using R.
Write 2–3 sentences about your background — where you studied, what you're working on,
or what kind of problems you love solving.

---

## Background

Tell your story here. A few paragraphs work well:

- Where did you study / what's your degree?
- What got you into data science?
- What are you working on now (job, research, personal projects)?

---

## Skills

```{=html}
<div class="skills-strip">
  <span class="skill-pill">R</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">ggplot2</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">tidyverse</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">tidymodels</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Shiny</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Quarto</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">SQL</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Statistics</span>
  <span class="skill-pill">Data Visualization</span>
</div>
```

---

## Contact

- 📧 [your.email@example.com](mailto:your.email@example.com)
- 🐙 [github.com/yourusername](https://github.com/yourusername)
- 💼 [linkedin.com/in/yourusername](https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername)
